error.missing_grid_signal: Either net_grid_sensor OR (grid_import_sensor + grid_export_sensor) is required.
error.mutual_exclusivity_failed: grid_import and grid_export are both > 0; one of them is likely wired backwards.
error.negative_solar: Solar production sensor reports a persistent negative value; check clamp direction.
error.ev_draw_implausible: EV consumption doesn't match the expected draw for the set charge current.
